case_title: PACIFIC GAS AND ELECTRIC COMPANY VS CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO WATER DEPARTMENT

docket_entries.description: ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO WATER DEPARTMENT
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO WATER DEPARTMENT

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PACIFIC GAS AND ELECTRIC COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO WATER DEPARTMENT $693.00 PRINCIPAL, $62.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $755.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $693.00 FILED BY PACIFIC GAS AND ELECTRIC COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO WATER DEPARTMENT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-13-1993 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 06
